#  Apache Flink 2.2.1 Release Announcement
May 15, 2026 - Sergey Nuyanzin
The Apache Flink Community is pleased to announce the first bug fix release of the Flink 2.2 series.
This release includes 44 bug fixes, vulnerability fixes, and mino…
